reviews.review_description:
So the graphics on this game aren't all that amazing but the game itself is instantly fun. I challenge you to play this game and not crack a smile or burst a little giggle while playing! 

My 10 year old son had fun playing this game saying, "This game is fun because you get to throw animals on the ark."

My 8 year old daughter had a blast saying, "I like that I made mistakes (missing the ark), I liked the animals and their sounds they made. The game was stressful but I had so much fun playing it!"

grab the animals, throw them in the ark. it gets increasingly more difficult the more animals you have to save. best part is that its based on the Bible and lead to some good discussions with my kids.  "Dad, why did Noah have to save spiders?"  :)
